description: Adds or updates a pie chart on the workbench canvas from static slice data (CanvasBlock with type pie and Graph content). Ideal for proportions (share of traffic, error budget consumed, etc.). Reuse the same `identifier` to refresh slices in place. `layout` is required for grid position and size.

identifier.description: Unique key for this canvas block (e.g. `errors_by_type`).

layout.description: Required grid placement (CanvasBlock.Layout). All of x, y, w, and h must be set.

x.description: Column index of the top-left cell (0-based).

y.description: Row index of the top-left cell (0-based).

props.description: Chart configuration (WorkbenchJobResult.CanvasBlock.Graph): a display title plus labeled numeric slices.

title.description: Short chart title (e.g. `Incident events by source`).

data.description: Slice values (WorkbenchJobResult.DataPoint). Each item is one wedge; `value` is the slice size (absolute count or amount).
